Job Description: Junior Data Analyst
Company: DataCo (B2B SaaS company)
Location: Bangalore, India (Hybrid)
Employment Type: Full-time
Experience Required: 0-2 years

We are looking for a Junior Data Analyst to join our data team.

Required Skills:
- Python (pandas, numpy)
- SQL (intermediate level)
- Data visualization (Tableau, PowerBI, or Matplotlib)
- Basic statistics and data cleaning

Nice to have:
- Machine learning fundamentals
- Experience with cloud data warehouses (BigQuery, Redshift, Snowflake)
- Excel / Google Sheets proficiency

What you will do:
- Analyze business data and generate actionable insights
- Build dashboards and reports for stakeholders
- Clean and validate datasets from various sources
- Collaborate with product and engineering teams

We welcome recent graduates and career switchers with relevant project experience.
